title: hibiscus cannabinus var. unidens
intro: Hibiscus cannabinus var. unidens, also known as Bhringaraj, is a plant species in the mallow family that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to help in reducing stress and promoting overall health. The health benefits of Bhringaraj include improving hair growth, reducing dandruff and other scalp problems, as well as supporting liver and digestive health. Bhringaraj is often prepared as an oil or powder for topical application, or as a decoction for internal use, and is commonly used in Ayurvedic medicine.
